description: Likely rearranges, completes, or recolors existing objects while preserving the canvas and color set. Colors are preserved as a set, though positions may change. Primary structural cue: same colors. Inferred transformation family: move/complete/recolor. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_d07ae81c(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, F)
    x2 = sizefilter(x1, ONE)
    x3 = apply(color, x2)
    x4 = difference(x1, x2)
    x5 = apply(color, x4)
    x6 = first(x5)
    x7 = last(x5)
    x8 = ofcolor(I, x6)
    x9 = ofcolor(I, x7)
    x10 = rbind(shoot, UNITY)
    x11 = rbind(shoot, NEG_UNITY)
    x12 = rbind(shoot, DOWN_LEFT)
    x13 = rbind(shoot, UP_RIGHT)
    x14 = fork(combine, x10, x11)
    x15 = fork(combine, x12, x13)
    x16 = fork(combine, x14, x15)
    x17 = compose(x16, center)
    x18 = mapply(x17, x2)
    x19 = intersection(x8, x18)
    x20 = intersection(x9, x18)
    x21 = first(x2)
    x22 = color(x21)
    x23 = center(x21)
    x24 = neighbors(x23)
    x25 = toobject(x24, I)
    x26 = mostcolor(x25)
    x27 = other(x3, x22)
    x28 = equality(x26, x6)
    x29 = branch(x28, x22, x27)
    x30 = branch(x28, x27, x22)
    x31 = fill(I, x29, x19)
    O = fill(x31, x30, x20)
    return O
